title: dortmanna infesta
intro: Dortmanna infesta, also known as Dittany or Ortie, is a perennial plant native to Europe and western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Dortmanna infesta include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, promote healing, and prevent infection, which is particularly useful for treating minor cuts and scrapes. Herbal preparations of Dortmanna infesta include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
